title: Artusian crystal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:A-crystal.jpg|thumb|100px|Large Artusian crystal in the [[Kejim Outpost|research facility]] on [[Kejim]]]]
[[File:JKJO_artusiancrystal.png|thumb|Artusian crystals.]]
'''Artusian crystals''' were a substance found and mined on [[Artus Prime]]. 

Those crystals were considered unstable and/or dangerous, and fell into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Ordinance 20098-B]], which required reports on their collection and processing.<ref name="NRIR">{{LucasArts|url=products/outcast/html/spin.html|text=N.R.I. Reports|int=N.R.I. Reports}}</ref> 

The colony administrator revealed the discovery of a large deposit of such crystals to the Republic; soon after the colony fell under the [[Empire Reborn]], and the administrator he failed to renew his weekly transmissions with more details, as was required by the ordinance.<ref name="NRIR" />

They were the primary component in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Galak Fyyar]]'s plan to infuse [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|powers]] into [[Human/Legends|Human]] subjects with little [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]]. Initial attempts to do this in [[Kejim Outpost]] were unsuccessful, but the goal was finally achieved after the crystals themselves were infused with the power of the [[Valley of the Jedi]]. A small Artusian crystal was a vital part of the [[Shadowtrooper]] armor.<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>

Artusian crystals were described as "very much like [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|those]] found in a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]." However, given the wide variety of crystals used in lightsabers, the precise properties of Artusian crystals remained unknown.

Following the death of [[Desann]], [[Lannik Racto]] possessed at least three of these crystals; they were presumably seized along with the rest of his [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifacts]] following [[Second mission to Coruscant (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|his capture]] by [[Jaden Korr]].<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>
